name: Curried Broccoli Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the broccoli and cut it into pieces.
2. Cover with boiling water and 1 teaspoon salt; cook for about 15 minutes or until tender. Drain well.
3. Mash and add to the chicken stock in a heavy saucepan.
4. Heat butter in a separate pan; brown onion lightly.
5. Add the onion to the stock.
6. In the remaining butter, fry curry powder and cayenne until dark brown.
7. Stir in cornstarch; cook to a smooth paste.
8. Gradually add stock, stirring well; return mixture to saucepan.
9. Simmer 5 minutes.
10. Press through sieve or puree with blender.
11. Add whipping cream just before serving.
12. Sprinkle with chopped watercress.
